mapper.select:
SELECT bi.pid AS pid, MAX(r.time) AS time,
CASE bi.type WHEN 'entry' THEN '其他入库单' WHEN 'extry' THEN '其他出库单' WHEN 'swapOut' THEN '调拨单-出' WHEN 'swapEnter' THEN '调拨单-入' WHEN 'buy' THEN '采购单' WHEN 'bre' THEN '采购退货单' WHEN 'sell' THEN '销售单' WHEN 'sre' THEN '销售退货单' ELSE bi.type END AS type,
CASE WHEN bi.type = 'entry' THEN (SELECT number FROM entry WHERE id = bi.class) WHEN bi.type = 'extry' THEN (SELECT number FROM extry WHERE id = bi.class) WHEN bi.type = 'swap' THEN (SELECT number FROM swap WHERE id = bi.class) WHEN bi.type = 'swapOut' THEN (SELECT number FROM swap WHERE id = bi.class) WHEN bi.type = 'swapEnter' THEN (SELECT number FROM swap WHERE id = bi.class) WHEN bi.type = 'sell' THEN (SELECT number FROM sell WHERE id = bi.class) WHEN bi.type = 'sre' THEN (SELECT number FROM sre WHERE id = bi.class) WHEN bi.type = 'buy' THEN (SELECT number FROM buy WHERE id = bi.class) WHEN bi.type = 'bre' THEN (SELECT number FROM bre WHERE id = bi.class) ELSE '' END AS number,
CASE bi.direction WHEN 0 THEN '减少' WHEN 1 THEN '增加' ELSE '' END AS info, bi.nums AS nums FROM batch_info bi LEFT JOIN record r ON ((bi.type = 'swapOut' OR bi.type = 'swapEnter' OR bi.type = 'swap') AND r.type = 'swap' AND bi.class = r.source) OR (bi.type NOT IN ('swapOut', 'swapEnter', 'swap') AND bi.type = r.type AND bi.class = r.source) LEFT JOIN batch b ON bi.pid = b.id WHERE
bi.pid IN
#{pidValue}
AND bi.type IN
#{typeValue}
AND r.time >= STR_TO_DATE(#{batchDetailQuery.startTime}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND r.time <= STR_TO_DATE(#{batchDetailQuery.endTime}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND b.warehouse IN
#{warehouseId}
AND ( (bi.type = 'entry' AND (SELECT number FROM entry WHERE id = bi.class) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{batchDetailQuery.number}, '%')) OR (bi.type = 'extry' AND (SELECT number FROM extry WHERE id = bi.class) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{batchDetailQuery.number}, '%')) OR ((bi.type = 'swap' OR bi.type = 'swapOut' OR bi.type = 'swapEnter') AND (SELECT number FROM swap WHERE id = bi.class) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{batchDetailQuery.number}, '%')) OR (bi.type = 'sell' AND (SELECT number FROM sell WHERE id = bi.class) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{batchDetailQuery.number}, '%')) OR (bi.type = 'sre' AND (SELECT number FROM sre WHERE id = bi.class) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{batchDetailQuery.number}, '%')) OR (bi.type = 'buy' AND (SELECT number FROM buy WHERE id = bi.class) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{batchDetailQuery.number}, '%')) OR (bi.type = 'bre' AND (SELECT number FROM bre WHERE id = bi.class) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{batchDetailQuery.number}, '%')) )
GROUP BY bi.pid, bi.type, bi.class, number, bi.direction, bi.nums
ORDER BY time DESC
